methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

top.text:
The rotation is shorthanded up top, but the farm is cooking.

Owen Ayers and Josiah Hartshorn are on hot streaks at Double-A Knoxville. Jefferson Rojas has back-to-back 3-hit games. Will Sanders spun five scoreless for Iowa.

The cavalry is

.783 OPS. 11 home runs. 14 stolen bases.

Pete Crow-Armstrong is becoming one of the most complete outfielders in baseball — and the Cubs desperately need him to keep being the story while the rotation burns.

Sophomore leap is fully underw

Cubs are 35-34 and 1 game over .500, with the Brewers running away at 41-23.

Division title is out of reach. Wild card is the real race.

This road trip against a 28-41 Giants squad is where the Cubs make their case.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #M

Cubs' starters: 2-12, 7.11 ERA in their last 20 games.

DEAD LAST in baseball.

49 days to the deadline. Hoyer is shopping. Casey Mize and Reid Detmers are among the names. The rotation needs reinforcements — and it needs them fast.

#Cubs

Cubs go for the sweep this afternoon at Oracle Park. 2:10 PM CT on ABC.

Colin Rea (5-4, 5.19 ERA) vs Logan Webb (3-4, 3.88 ERA) — the Giants' ace finally shows up in Game 3.

Cubs lead the series 2-0. Let's finish it.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTh

Pete Crow-Armstrong homered on the FIRST PITCH of the game.

Cubs went on to beat the Giants 6-1. Ian Happ and Pedro Ramírez added solo shots. Ben Brown went 5 innings, 1 run, picks up win No. 3. Cubs lead the series 2-0.

#Cubs #GoCubs #Fl

Cubs 36-34. Brewers 41-25. Cardinals 37-29.

The division is gone — that's math. But 3 games behind St. Louis for a wild card slot? That's a real race.

Two wins in a row. Winnable series tonight and Sunday. This is how you climb.

#Cubs #N

Ben Brown is one of the most quietly dominant pitchers in baseball right now. 🧊

1.74 ERA. 0.88 WHIP. 58 strikeouts. 0 homers allowed all season.

He starts tonight at Oracle Park, 9:05 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

Michael Busch's 3-run shot into McCovey Cove put it on ice. ⚾

Giants are 28-42, running one of baseball's worst rotations. Assad neutralized them — 6 IP, 5 K, 0 homers.

The Cubs needed to beat bad teams. They're doing it.

#Cubs #CubsBase

Matthew Boyd's return is DELAYED — left shoulder soreness in a bullpen session.

Horton, Steele, and Taillon are already on IL. Now Boyd pushes back further.

THREE rotation arms lost to injury — plus Boyd in limbo. The Cubs are out of runw

Pete Crow-Armstrong: .263/.341/.462, 13 HR, 16 SB, 3.9 WAR. Hit for the CYCLE two nights ago — first in all of MLB this season.

265,000 All-Star votes. Ranked 14th among NL outfielders.

That's not a snub. That's a crime.

#Cubs #GoCubs #M

Tonight at Coors Field: Colin Rea (5-3, 4.59 ERA) vs Tomoyuki Sugano (5-4, 3.98 ERA).

Sugano is the Rockies' best arm — but this is the same staff with the WORST ERA in baseball. Attack the bullpen early and often.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

.263/.341/.462. 12 home runs. 15 stolen bases. 3.9 WAR — among MLB's leaders.

Pete Crow-Armstrong is playing at an All-Star level. The national attention is overdue.

On a team with a busted rotation, PCA is holding this thing together.

bottom_performers.text:
Michael Busch's 3-run shot into McCovey Cove put it on ice. ⚾

Giants are 28-42, running one of baseball's worst rotations. Assad neutralized them — 6 IP, 5 K, 0 homers.

The Cubs needed to beat bad teams. They're doing it.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

The Brewers are 41-25. The division is gone.

Cubs sit at 37-35 and locked into the wild card race. Not a concession — a pivot.

Division rivals are crowding the hunt. Every win vs. a basement team matters. Three against Colorado starts tonight.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Assad: 6 IP, 3 H, 5 K. Busch splashed into McCovey Cove — 3-run shot. Cubs 5, Giants 1. 🎯

Assad moves to 4-1, 3rd straight win in 7 starts. Suzuki RBI double, Hoerner sac fly.

Cubs 36-34. The road trip is off to a great start.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Pete Crow-Armstrong hit for the CYCLE. Cubs walk off the Rockies 5-4.

First REVERSE cycle in Cubs franchise history — HR, triple, double, single. The 13th cycle overall.

4-for-4, 2 RBI, 19-game on-base streak. This is what a franchise player looks like.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Cubs 7, Pirates 2. Happ 2-run HR, Suzuki 2 hits and 2 RBI. The Cubs handed Skenes his 3rd straight loss and split the Pittsburgh series.

Skenes fanned 10 in 5.1 IP but 2 Pittsburgh errors in the 6th gifted a 3-0 lead. Cubs leave Pittsburgh at 31-26. 🔥

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs
